seoTitle: Kemmis vs Kenilworth — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kemmis and Kenilworth. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kemmis and Kenilworth.
heading: Kemmis vs Kenilworth — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kemmis, Queensland and Kenilworth, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kenilworth has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Kemmis (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kemmis or Kenilworth safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kemmis has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Kenilworth scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kemmis scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Kenilworth scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kemmis or Kenilworth?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kenilworth has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
